query:
UPDATE registrations SET passportOcrData = '{"fullName":"PARK JEEHYUN","koreanName":"박지현","passportNo":"M087A2750","nationality":"KOR","dateOfBirth":"1953-06-08","sex":"F","dateOfExpiry":"2035-07-10","dateOfIssue":"2025-07-10"}' WHERE name = 'PAEK JEEHYUN';
